creator: stephen@math.missouri.edu
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of science/gromacs,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/131655 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/131655
> 

I agree with the patch.

This patch rewrites the port a lot.  I would be happy to relinquish 
maintainership of the port to the originator of this PR, if Joerg Pulz 
agrees.
